# Fundamentals

## Goals

- Understand the embedded software problem space
- Identify common constraints: memory, timing, power, reliability
- Set a baseline architecture for maintainable firmware

## Example listing

```c
// code/gpio_blink.c
#include <stdint.h>

volatile uint32_t * const GPIO_OUT = (uint32_t *)0x50000000;

void blink_once(void) {
    *GPIO_OUT ^= (1u << 25);
}
```

## Figure reference

See @fig-architecture for a high-level system view.

::: {#fig-architecture}
![](../figures/architecture.svg){width=80%}

A typical embedded firmware architecture.
:::
